title: Power Inductors: AI's Quiet Power-Delivery Bottleneck
title_zh: 电源电感:AI 供电链上被低估的瓶颈
subtitle: As GPU power crosses 1kW, the magnetics that feed the chip become a constraint, not a commodity. POCO (Bokede New Material, 300811) is the vertical-power-delivery chip-inductor leader.
subtitle_zh: 当 GPU 功耗突破 1kW,给芯片供电的磁性元件从大宗耗材变成约束环节。铂科新材(300811)是垂直供电(VPD)芯片电感龙头。
one_liner: Everyone watches the GPU and HBM; almost nobody watches the inductor that delivers 200A into the back of that GPU. As accelerators cross 1kW, ferrite wirewound inductors saturate and die, alloy molded inductors become the only option, per-board content multiplies, and the value per part rises 3-5x — and POCO, alone among peers, owns the whole stack from soft-magnetic powder to the finished VPD chip inductor and ships it straight into NVIDIA.
one_liner_zh: 所有人盯着 GPU 和 HBM,几乎没人盯着那颗把 200A 大电流灌进 GPU 背面的电感。当加速卡功耗突破 1kW,传统铁氧体绕线电感会磁饱和失效,合金一体成型电感成为唯一解,单板用量翻倍、单颗价值量抬升 3-5 倍——而铂科新材是同行里唯一从软磁粉末一路做到成品 VPD 芯片电感、并直接供货英伟达的厂商。

sources.title: 铂科新材2025年营收突破18亿元 芯片电感第二增长曲线强势领跑
调研速递|铂科新材接待博裕资本等122家机构 电感业务占比超30%
铂科新材(300811):芯片电感新建产能投产在即,多元协同夯实公司成长弹性
AI芯片电感五年从25亿到440亿,国内龙头占比却不足5%,谁在抢跑
sources.publisher: 兴业证券 / 网易转载

sources.title: 铂科新材的前世今生:营收18.02亿,毛利率42.06%远超同行
sources.publisher: 新浪财经 / 国信证券

sources.title: 芯片电感,顺络电子和铂科新材
磁饱和成最大短板!高端GPU弃用传统电感,一体成型电感成算力供电标配
英飞凌推出业界首款电流密度超2 A/mm²的TLVR四相电源模组

entities.name: 铂科新材 (POCO, 300811.SZ)
entities.role: Upstream + midstream — soft-magnetic powder → powder cores → VPD chip inductors (fully integrated)
entities.role_zh: 上游+中游 — 软磁粉末→金属软磁粉芯→VPD 芯片电感(全链一体化)
entities.note: 2025 revenue RMB1.802bn (+8.38% YoY), net profit RMB418m (+11.29%); 2026Q1 revenue RMB490m (+27.73%). 2025 gross margin 42.06% vs industry avg 23.88%. The chip-inductor line is the declared second growth curve and the cleanest AI power-delivery pure-play.
entities.note_zh: 2025 年营收 18.02 亿元(同比+8.38%),归母净利 4.18 亿元(+11.29%);2026Q1 营收 4.90 亿元(+27.73%)。2025 毛利率 42.06%,远高于行业平均 23.88%。芯片电感是公司明确的第二增长曲线,也是 AI 供电链上最纯正的标的。

entities.name: NVIDIA
entities.role: Demand anchor — accelerator power roadmap (1kW+ GPUs, VPD/TLVR)
entities.role_zh: 需求锚 — 加速卡供电路线图(1kW+ GPU、VPD/TLVR)
entities.note: GPU power is moving from 200-300W to 1kW+, which forces more phases and more inductors per board; the Rubin-class rack is reported to use 9,000-11,000 inductors. POCO ships VPD chip inductors into this socket directly.
entities.note_zh: GPU 功耗从 200-300W 升至 1kW+,倒逼供电相数与单板电感用量增加;Rubin 级机柜单柜电感用量据称达 9,000-11,000 颗。铂科新材直接供货这一环节。

entities.name: 顺络电子 (002138.SZ)
entities.role: Closest competitor — broad-line current/thin inductors, buys powder externally
entities.role_zh: 最直接竞争对手 — 大电流/超薄电感全场景,粉料以外购为主
entities.note: Product line is broader and customers are more diversified, but it does not make its own upstream powder and its VPD-segment share and technology trail POCO; data-center revenue was still <5% of total as of 2026Q1.
entities.note_zh: 产品线更全、客户更分散,但不自产上游粉料,VPD 环节的技术与市占率落后于铂科;截至 2026Q1 数据中心业务营收占比仍不足 5%。

entities.name: Infineon (英飞凌)
entities.role: Power-module integrator — TLVR multiphase modules (inductor + decoupling cap)
entities.role_zh: 电源模组集成商 — TLVR 多相模组(电感+解耦电容集成)
entities.note: Launched a TLVR four-phase module integrating four power stages, TLVR inductors and decoupling capacitors into a 9x10x5mm package at >2 A/mm² and 320A peak — evidence the power-delivery layer is consolidating into high-density magnetic-plus-capacitor modules.
entities.note_zh: 推出 TLVR 四相模组,将四个功率级、TLVR 电感与解耦电容集成进 9x10x5mm 封装,电流密度>2 A/mm²、峰值 320A——印证供电环节正向高密度「磁性+电容」模组整合。

claims.text: A conventional server uses ~30-50 inductors; a 4-GPU AI server uses 80-120, and inductors per GPU rise from 22 to 48-64 (a >200% increase), with a Rubin-class rack reported at 9,000-11,000 inductors.
claims.text_zh: 传统服务器用约 30-50 颗电感,4 卡 AI 服务器用 80-120 颗,单 GPU 配套电感从 22 颗升至 48-64 颗(增幅超 200%),Rubin 级单柜更达 9,000-11,000 颗。

claims.text: Management states that rising GPU/ASIC shipment volumes and power (GPU power moving from 200-300W to 1kW+) directly drive higher inductor count, and that as Google/Amazon accelerate in-house ASIC deployment, 2026 is an important inflection point for demand.
claims.text_zh: 公司管理层表示,GPU/ASIC 出货量与功率提升(GPU 功率从 200-300W 升至 1KW+)将直接带动电感用量增加;随着谷歌、亚马逊加速部署自研 ASIC,预计 2026 年是需求的重要转折点。

claims.text: Vertical power delivery (VPD) requires inductor thickness compressed from 8-9mm to 2-5mm, and the per-unit value of a TLVR inductor rises from ~$0.5 to $1-2.5 (a 3-5x uplift) — so content growth comes from both more parts and higher value per part.
claims.text_zh: 垂直供电(VPD)要求电感厚度从 8-9mm 压缩至 2-5mm,TLVR 电感单颗价值量从约 0.5 美金提升至 1-2.5 美金(提升 3-5 倍)——增量同时来自「用量更多」和「单颗更贵」。

claims.text: Industrial Securities projects the broad AI chip-inductor TAM growing from roughly RMB2.5bn in 2025 to roughly RMB44bn by 2030 — a ~20x, five-year expansion, while domestic leaders still hold under 5% share today.
claims.text_zh: 兴业证券预测,广义 AI 芯片电感的市场空间(TAM)将从 2025 年约 25 亿元增长至 2030 年约 440 亿元——五年约 20 倍,而当下国内龙头市占率仍不足 5%。

claims.text: At kilowatt power and kilo-ampere transient currents, traditional ferrite wirewound inductors saturate and fail; high-end GPUs are abandoning them and alloy molded (integrated-formed) inductors with soft-saturation, low-loss, shielded characteristics have become a hard requirement rather than a BOM-cost choice.
claims.text_zh: 在千瓦功耗、千安级瞬态电流下,传统铁氧体绕线电感会磁饱和失效;高端 GPU 正全面淘汰它,具备软饱和、低损耗、磁屏蔽的合金一体成型电感已从「降本选项」变成「刚需」。

claims.text: Infineon's first-of-its-kind TLVR four-phase module integrates four power stages, TLVR inductors and decoupling capacitors into a 9x10x5mm package delivering >2 A/mm^2 and up to 320A peak — confirming the power-delivery layer is consolidating into dense magnetic-plus-capacitor modules.
claims.text_zh: 英飞凌业界首款 TLVR 四相模组,把四个功率级、TLVR 电感与解耦电容集成进 9x10x5mm 封装,电流密度>2 A/mm²、峰值达 320A——印证供电环节正整合为高密度的「磁性+电容」模组。

claims.text: POCO is described as the outright leader in VPD chip inductors and supplies NVIDIA directly: the VPD chip inductor sits on the back of the GPU and a ~2mm-thick part withstands ~200A, without which voltage would swing beyond the chip's tolerance.
claims.text_zh: 铂科新材被称为 VPD 垂直供电芯片电感的绝对龙头,且直接供货英伟达:VPD 芯片电感贴在 GPU 背面,约 2mm 厚度即可承受约 200A 大电流,没有它电压会瞬间超出芯片承受范围。

claims.text: POCO's 2025 gross margin was 42.06% versus an industry average of 23.88%, with a 23.0% debt-to-asset ratio below the industry's 34.04% — the profitability and balance-sheet edge of being integrated from powder to finished device.
claims.text_zh: 铂科新材 2025 年毛利率 42.06%,远高于行业平均 23.88%;资产负债率 23.0%,低于行业 34.04%——这是从粉末到成品器件全链一体化带来的盈利与资产负债表优势。

claims.text: Chip-inductor shipments grew ~200% YoY in 2025, after the line's 2024 revenue rose ~275.76% to about RMB386m — the ramp is already in the numbers, not just guidance.
claims.text_zh: 芯片电感 2025 年出货量同比增长约 200%,此前 2024 年该业务营收同比+约 275.76% 至约 3.86 亿元——放量已经体现在报表里,不只是指引。

claims.text: POCO's new Huizhou high-end integrated-formed inductor line (phase 1) is set to come online in H1 2026; at full utilization chip-inductor capacity could reach ~250 million parts, roughly +400% versus current capacity, making POCO one of the clearest capacity-expansion plays in the segment.
claims.text_zh: 铂科惠州新型高端一体成型电感一期计划 2026 年上半年投产,满产后芯片电感产能或达约 2.5 亿片,较当前增长约 400%,是该板块产能扩张最明确的标的之一。

claims.text: 2026Q1 revenue was RMB490m (+27.73% YoY) with net profit of RMB88.52m (+20%), and 2025 operating cash flow reached RMB347m (+209.04%) — acceleration and cash quality are improving together.
claims.text_zh: 2026 年一季度营收 4.90 亿元(同比+27.73%),归母净利 8851.91 万元(+20%);2025 年经营活动现金流净额 3.47 亿元(同比+209.04%)——增速与现金质量同步改善。

claims.text: By 2026Q1 the inductor-component business accounted for over 30% of revenue, with mass-production breakthroughs in ASIC and optical-module applications.
claims.text_zh: 到 2026 年一季度,电感元件业务在营收中占比已超过 30%,并在 ASIC、光模块等应用上取得量产突破。

claims.text: Over 50% of POCO's revenue comes from a single customer (in contrast to the more diversified base of peer 顺络电子) — a price cut, share reallocation or in-housing decision by that one account would hit results directly.
claims.text_zh: 铂科超过 50% 的收入来自单一大客户(对比顺络电子更分散的客户结构)——这一个客户的降价、份额调整或转向自研,都会直接冲击业绩。

claims.text: Dongxing Securities models 2026-2028 net profit of RMB660m/902m/1,122m, implying PE of 38.82x/28.43x/22.85x — much of the growth is already priced in, leaving little tolerance for any slip in the ramp timeline.
claims.text_zh: 东兴证券预测 2026-2028 年归母净利 6.60/9.02/11.22 亿元,对应 PE 38.82x/28.43x/22.85x——高成长已被相当程度计入,对兑现节奏的任何延后都缺乏容错空间。

claims.text: Sell-side notes explicitly flag the risk that new-capacity release and yield/delivery improvement could lag plan; 2025 H1 growth already slowed because end customers had not begun mass production — confirming the ramp is lumpy and timing-dependent.
claims.text_zh: 卖方研报明确提示风险:新增产能释放、良率与交付改善节奏可能延后;2025 上半年就因终端尚未量产而增速放缓——印证爬坡是非线性的、对时点高度依赖。

claims.text: 顺络电子 has highly overlapping high-current/thin-inductor products already shipping at scale into AI servers, and management notes the share of standardized chip-inductor products will gradually rise — both of which can compress the price/margin premium today's customized VPD parts enjoy.
claims.text_zh: 顺络电子在大电流/超薄电感上与铂科高度重合且已规模出货 AI 服务器,且公司也承认标准化芯片电感产品比例将逐步提升——两者都会侵蚀当前定制化 VPD 产品所享有的价格/毛利溢价。

claims.text: Analyst view (unsourced): chip-inductor content is a high-beta derivative of AI-server capex. The per-board content uplift is real, but if hyperscaler capex hits an air-pocket, a unit-volume cut can overwhelm the content story — this is a derivative of the AI buildout, not an independent secular driver.
claims.text_zh: 分析师观点(无引用):芯片电感的单机价值量是 AI 服务器资本开支的高 beta 衍生量。单板价值量提升是真实的,但一旦超大规模厂商资本开支出现空窗,出货量下滑会盖过价值量提升的逻辑——它是 AI 建设的衍生品,而非独立的长期驱动。

monitorables: POCO quarterly chip-inductor revenue mix and the Huizhou phase-1 yield/utilization curve — the cleanest read on whether the +400% capacity actually converts to shipments.
Customer-concentration disclosure: any change in the >50% single-customer dependence (new design-ins at Flex/MPS, or in-housing risk).
NVIDIA VPD/TLVR roadmap commitments at GTC and Rubin per-rack inductor content (the largest content swing factor).
Competitive share shift: 顺络电子 and module integrators (Infineon) VPD design-win cadence and any standardization that compresses ASP.
Hyperscaler AI-capex revisions — the upstream beta the whole content story rides on.
monitorables_zh: 铂科芯片电感的季度收入占比与惠州一期良率/产能利用率曲线——判断「+400% 产能」能否真正兑现为出货的最实时指标。
客户集中度披露:>50% 单一大客户依赖是否改善(伟创力/MPS 新料号导入,或被客户自研替代的风险)。
英伟达在 GTC 上的 VPD/TLVR 路线图承诺,以及 Rubin 单柜电感用量(最大的价值量摆动因子)。
竞争份额变化:顺络电子与模组集成商(英飞凌)的 VPD design-win 节奏,以及标准化对单价(ASP)的压制。
超大规模厂商 AI 资本开支的上修/下修——整条价值量叙事所依附的上游 beta。

bullish.verdict: Structurally bullish on the AI power-inductor / VPD chip-inductor bottleneck, with POCO (Bokede New Material) as the cleanest pure-play. The content story is supply-architecture-driven (1kW+ accelerators force alloy molded inductors and vertical power delivery), the leader is uniquely integrated from soft-magnetic powder to finished device, and capacity — not demand — is the near-term swing factor.
bullish.verdict_zh: 对 AI 电源电感 / VPD 芯片电感这一瓶颈结构性看多,铂科新材是最纯正的标的。价值量逻辑由供电架构驱动(1kW+ 加速卡倒逼合金一体成型电感与垂直供电),龙头从软磁粉末到成品器件全链一体化,近端摆动因子是产能而非需求。
bullish.conviction: High (structural content growth), with risk concentrated in single-customer concentration, valuation, and capacity-ramp execution.
bullish.conviction_zh: 高(结构性单机价值量增长),风险集中在单一大客户集中度、估值与产能爬坡执行三点上。
